violations.description: Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. A bucket and other cleaning items were stored in the hand sink by the dish area.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. The restroom door by the dish area is not self closing.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. Soap was not available for the front hand sink.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
